title.en: So, Ye Tian immediately came to the Time Tradin...

content.en:
The message from the Time Merchant said that there was news of the Time River Pearl, but it was not someone who auctioned the Time River Pearl.

There are really not many people willing to auction this kind of treasure, unless there is really a lack of some treasure, they will choose to auction it in the form of barter.

This time, the Time Merchant said that the Time River Bead appeared in a ruin, but the specific situation would not be known until the Time Firm.

So, Ye Tian immediately came to the Time Trading House of the Infinite Sea.

......

Time Firm.

Ye Tian found that there were many legendary lords in today's time trading house, even half-step legendary realm lords.

After all, when it comes to the Time River Bead, not only Ye Tian needs it, but others also need it, treasures like the Time River Bead are too useful, not only to help condense the Supreme Legend, but even to help control time.

Soon.

Ye Tian learned about the specific situation at the time trading bank.

It turned out that a ruin was discovered in the Void Area not long ago, which can also be said to be the graveyard of a legendary realm lord.

Legend has it that the lord of the realm is very difficult to fall, either he is killed by someone, and there is no cemetery, unless he is mortally injured, the unstoppable flow of life cannot be cured, and he will definitely die, so he will build a cemetery for himself before he dies.

08 And this time this is the case, the legendary realm lord built a cemetery before he died, in fact, a long time ago, the news that the legendary realm lord was about to fall came out, but no one found the other party.

And that Legendary Realm Lord possesses a Time River Pearl.

A peak Legendary Realm Lord of the Time Merchant House calculated that the Time River Bead was still there, and it had not been used by the Legendary Realm Lord, and it was in that cemetery

It stands to reason that once this cemetery is discovered, the Peak Legends Realm Lord should be able to easily take the treasures inside, but in fact, he can't.

Because this cemetery prohibits the entry of lords above the half-step Legendary Realm, the half-step Legendary Realm Lord cannot break through the prohibition arranged by the Legendary Realm Lord at all, and the Legendary Realm Lord does not dare to forcibly invade that cemetery.

Because once it is forcibly invaded, that cemetery is connected to the long river of time, which will cause a time explosion, and the power of the long river of time will be vented, and it will even be enough to severely damage the Legendary Realm Lord, and only the peak Legendary Lord will be unscathed.

However, the Peak Legendary Realm Lord will not destroy this cemetery, once it is destroyed, all the treasures in this cemetery are destroyed, and even the Time River Bead cannot be saved, then it is meaningless.

Moreover, just a time river bead could not make the peak legend realm lead the initiative at all.

At this time, the Time Merchant House was filled with the voices of the legendary lords chatting.

"I heard that this time the Time Firm is going to auction the location of the remains of the cemetery. "

"Time quotient is really good at making money, and I am afraid that a position will sell a lot of wealth.

There is no way, now that this position is in the hands of the Time Firm, if we want to enter that ruin, we can only buy the location. "

"Someone found out, and then asked the Time Firm to auction it, otherwise the Time Firm itself would let the legendary lord enter and explore, and with the strength of the Time Firm, it would not be a problem to find out the Time River Bead. "

"Wait for the news, the auction time will definitely come out. "

Ye Tian waited for news in the Time Firm, and didn't let him wait too long, when a person in charge of the Time Firm appeared

The person in charge said: "Our time trading firm is about to start auctioning the location of the ruin, and the person who obtains the location of the relic must not tell others about it, and must make an oath."

Black heart!

Many legendary lords thought.

If they can say it, they can at least talk about it to their own forces, or sell it to others, but once the restriction is restricted, they must make an oath, then they can only auction it themselves and go by themselves.

In this way, the time trading house may make more money from selling its position than from entering that cemetery, after all, no one knows how many good things there are in that cemetery?

"Did you enter the ruins of the time firm, if you did, then there was no need to auction it.

A Transcendental Legendary Lord said.

"Don't worry, we only sent one Legendary Lord of the Transcendental Realm, and we quickly withdrew, and we didn't go deep into the ruins, so you're worried that our Time Merchant won't take the treasures inside. The person in charge of the Time Firm said.

"That's good. "

Many Legendary Lords are still very relieved about the credibility of the Time Firm, at least a Legendary Realm Lord's graveyard is not enough for them to destroy their reputation.

It didn't take long for the auction to begin.

Time Firm, Inner Void.

One by one, the legendary lords came, but there were not a few half-step legendary realm lords, and it was impossible for these to go to the auction, because there was no need, and the auction was in hand, and they couldn't enter the ruins.

Therefore, they just came to see the excitement.

Basically, the people who come here are the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords and a few Realm Legendary Lords, because that kind of ruin is bound to be very dangerous, and it is easy for the Realm Legendary Lords to fall when they enter it.

Once it falls, not only does it pay the price of the auction, but it also pays for a doppelganger.

If there is a legendary lord who doesn't even have a clone, then he won't dare to go in.

Then.

An auctioneer took out a card and said, "A card represents a place, we will send location information to the customer who has obtained the place at a certain time, and now we will start auctioning the first place, 30 million time coins." "

Time Coin is an internal currency issued by the Time Firm, and a 133 Time Coin is worth a lot, so 30 million Time Coin is comparable to the lifetime wealth of an ordinary Legendary Lord.

"Thirty million!"

A Transcendental Legendary Lord shouted.

No one raises the price!

They are not stupid!

It's just an auction quota, not a quota, and the time firm will not limit the quota, so they won't spend more money, saying that the starting price is 30 million time coins, which is actually the final transaction price.

No one increased the price, and the first spot was quickly determined.

"Thirty million time coins, I really don't have any. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he went to exchange Time Coins halfway through.

The Time Merchant collects a lot of valuable items, which can be exchanged for Time Coins.

Not long after, Ye Tian exchanged 30 million time coins and returned to the auction hall again.

Auction after auction, very fast.

The Transcendental Realm Lords of the Infinite Sea are limited, and the Transcendental Realm Lords who are willing to purchase places are also limited

Many Transcendental Lords would wait until the news had spread completely before going to that ruin, not in a hurry to be the first to go

Therefore, they don't want to spend money in vain.

And Ye Tian was in a hurry to take away the Time River Bead, so he naturally wanted to buy a place.

Soon, Ye Tiangong was the first to shout out the auction price: "Thirty million." "

A spot has been slotted!_
